lede: A look at October 25 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Princess Elisabeth, Duchess of Brabant and Katy Perry, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: 2023 Lewiston shootings
events.desc: A mass shooting occurs in two locations in Lewiston, Maine. 18 people are killed and 13 more injured.

events.title: Mount Merapi
events.desc: Mount Merapi in Indonesia begins a month-long series of violent eruptions that kill 353 people and cause the evacuation of another 350,000 people.

events.title: United States invasion of Grenada
events.desc: The United States and its Caribbean allies invade Grenada, six days after Prime Minister Maurice Bishop and several of his supporters are executed in a coup d'état.

events.title: USS Tang (SS-306)
events.desc: World War II: The USS Tang under Richard O'Kane (the top American submarine ace of the war) is sunk by the ship's own malfunctioning torpedo.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: Heinrich Himmler orders a crackdown on the Edelweiss Pirates, a loosely organized youth culture in Nazi Germany that had assisted army deserters and others to hide from the Third Reich.

events.title: SS Principessa Mafalda
events.desc: The Italian luxury liner SS Principessa Mafalda sinks off the coast of Brazil, killing 314.

events.title: Terence MacSwiney
events.desc: After 74 days on hunger strike in Brixton Prison, England, the Sinn Féin Lord Mayor of Cork, Terence MacSwiney dies.

events.title: Toronto Stock Exchange
events.desc: The Toronto Stock Exchange is created.

events.title: George III
events.desc: King George III succeeds to the British throne on the death of his grandfather George II.

events.title: Dirk Hartog
events.desc: Dutch sea-captain Dirk Hartog makes the second recorded landfall by a European on Australian soil, at the later-named Dirk Hartog Island off the West Australian coast.

births.name: Maxi Mounds
births.line: American nude big-bust model and pornographic actress

births.name: Azizan Abdul Razak
births.line: Malaysian politician, 10th Menteri Besar of Kedah (died 2013)

births.name: Jorge Batlle
births.line: Ibáñez, Uruguayan lawyer and politician, 32nd President of Uruguay (died 2016)

deaths.text: Mary Acworth Evershed, English astronomer and Dante scholar
Terence MacSwiney, Irish playwright, politician, Lord Mayor of Cork died on hunger strike
William Cavendish (courtier), English courtier and civil servant

observances.text: Christian feast day: Bernat Calbó (Bernard of Calvo)
Christian feast day: Crysanthus and Daria (Western Christianity)
